description: Fragment from the bottom of a legal document. Dated: Kislev 152[.] Seleucid = 1208–17 CE (the reading of the date is probably but not definite). Naming various houses (Dār Sitt [...], Dār al-Zayt...). Fragments of at least five signatures are preserved: [...] b. Moshe, Meʾir b. [...], Shemuʾel, Yiṣḥaq b. [...], and Shela b. [...]. Postscript in margin written by Yeshuʿa b. Eliyya ha-Levi stating that this will go to the benefit of the Heqdesh (אלמצלחה ללהקדש פי דלך). (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-13. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
